title: Weather: Partly cloudy and cool to warm
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has issued a fire danger warning for various parts of the country:

Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the south-eastern parts of Northern Cape, north-western parts of Free State, eastern parts of Eastern Cape and the western parts of KwaZulu-Natal.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeFine in the extreme west with morning fog over the extreme north-western parts, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-easterly but light to moderate westerly along the south coast from the afternoon.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeCloudy in places over interior in the morning, otherwise fine and cool, but warm in places in the north. The wind along the coast will be moderate south-westerly, becoming light in the evening.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and warm, but cool in places in the south-east. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures:



> Extended weather forecast for Thursday and Friday:


Partly cloudy and cool to warm with band of isolated showers and thundershowers stretching from the north-west to the south-east but scattered in the north-west on Thursday.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
